creator: einar@isnic.is
text:
There is a patch in review: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D43735

This adds 13 new R ports:
- graphics/R-cran-cowplot
- devel/R-cran-tidyverse
- databases/R-cran-dbplyr
- databases/R-cran-dtplyr
- devel/R-cran-conflicted
- devel/R-cran-gargle
- devel/R-cran-googledrive
- devel/R-cran-googlesheets4
- devel/R-cran-ids
- devel/R-cran-modelr
- devel/R-cran-systemfonts
- graphics/R-cran-ragg
- print/R-cran-textshaping

It builds and runs, but tests for R-cran-dbplyr require R-cran-RSQLITE >= 2.3.1.

There is another PR about updating R-cran-RSQLITE to satisfy that dependency.
